assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves the existing Security Configuration section with Product Lifecycle, Version Streams, and Source Repositories unchanged
assertion_results.evidence: The Security Configuration section in claude-md-result.md (lines 42-63) is identical to the reference fixture (lines 52-72). Product Lifecycle has all 5 fields (Product pages URL, Jira version prefix, Vulnerability issue type ID, Component label pattern, VEX Justification custom field), Version Streams table has 1 stream entry (2.1.x), and Source Repositories table has 2 entries (backend, frontend-ui) — all matching the reference exactly.

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md reports that Security Configuration is already fully configured or up to date
assertion_results.evidence: Discovery log line 28 states: 'Security Configuration | Already fully configured | Product Lifecycle (5 fields), Version Streams (1 stream), Source Repositories (2 repos) all present and populated'. Line 21 also states: 'All sections are already fully configured and up to date.'

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md indicates Security Configuration was preserved with no changes needed
assertion_results.evidence: Changes log line 11 states: 'Security Configuration | Preserved | Product Lifecycle, Version Streams, and Source Repositories all fully populated; no changes needed'. Line 3 also states: 'No changes were made. All sections are already fully configured.'

assertion_results.text: The skill does NOT offer the Security Configuration opt-in prompt — it detects the section already exists and is fully populated (idempotency skip)
assertion_results.evidence: Discovery log line 21: 'All sections are already fully configured and up to date. No opt-in prompts are needed since all sections already exist.' Changes log line 13: 'Setup is idempotent -- the existing configuration is complete and correct.' The Security Configuration section was detected as 'Already fully configured' in the discovery log (line 28), confirming the opt-in was skipped due to idempotency.
